title: 有馬記念の後に・筋肉の奇跡

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan runs with a mad fervor in the exalted
event that is the Arima Kinen, and her results
reflect her fantastic performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now cognizant of Ryan's abilities, Oguri Cap
vows to face her again in the same race next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this experience in hand, Mejiro Ryan aims
for a rematch against Mejiro McQueen with the
spring Tenno Sho next in her sights!
